overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic urban environment at night. The character ascends a wide staircase from a covered alley into an open pedestrian walkway beneath an elevated highway, passing food vendors and large digital billboards.

agents.ego_description: walking through covered corridor toward wide staircase ahead

notable_agents.action: companion in dark suit walking alongside ego toward stairs

bright red glowing Japanese characters mounted on left wall
wide stone stairs leading upward to next level
rectangular concrete container with green plants

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow covered alleyway illuminated by red neon signage. The camera follows from behind as they approach a wide concrete staircase at the end of the corridor, accompanied by an NPC companion.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide public staircase between concrete walls

events.description: begins ascending the concrete staircase from the alley

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs alongside other pedestrians moving in both directions

notable_agents.action: woman in dark clothing descending the stairs toward camera
companion continuing to ascend alongside ego

entered.detail: wide concrete steps with yellow edge markings
metal handrails along the left side of staircase
smooth concrete walls lining the right side of stairwell

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide concrete staircase flanked by walls and metal railings. Other pedestrians move up and down the stairs, including a woman descending on the left. The lighting shifts from neon red to warm artificial wall sconces.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway under elevated highway with food vendors

events.description: exits staircase into open pedestrian area beneath elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking along the pedestrian path under the concrete overpass

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at food cart with green containers and cooking equipment

entered.detail: street food stall with green bins and illuminated menu
massive concrete elevated highway structure overhead
pair of illuminated purple automated kiosks against the wall
illuminated advertisement screen showing commercial content

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs, the character enters a wide pedestrian walkway beneath an elevated highway. A food vendor operates a cart on the right while purple vending machines glow on the left. The space is dimly lit with ambient city light and neon accents.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial underpass with large digital advertisements

events.description: passing large illuminated GIRRUS billboard dominating the right wall

agents.ego_description: continuing along the underpass walkway past large digital screens and advertisements

entered.detail: massive curved digital screen displaying GIRRUS COLA advertisement with vehicle imagery
thick structural columns supporting the overpass
vertical illuminated advertisement panel on left wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks deeper into the underpass, passing massive concrete pillars and large digital billboards. A prominent curved screen displaying a GIRRUS COLA advertisement dominates the right wall, casting red and white light onto the walkway as the camera moves past it.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, neon-lit alleyway into a sprawling, illuminated urban underpass. It begins by following the character and a companion through a narrow corridor bathed in red neon light, moving steadily toward a wide concrete staircase. As the character ascends the stairs, the oppressive red glow gives way to the warm light of artificial wall sconces while pedestrians pass by in opposite directions. The scene then opens into a wide pedestrian walkway beneath an elevated highway, shifting from the enclosed stairs to a dim space punctuated by glowing purple vending machines and a food vendor's cart. Finally, the camera moves deeper into the underpass past massive concrete pillars, passing a curved digital billboard for Girrus Cola that casts a vivid red and white light across the walkway.
